summary: Phase 4 expansion testing completed successfully. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). New features tested: Creator self-registration portal (register, login, browse, profile), Push notifications system (register token, send test, broadcast), Store refresh with Shopify API integration. Privacy and Terms pages verified working at /privacy and /terms routes.
passed_tests: POST /api/creators/register creates a creator account (public endpoint)
POST /api/creators/login with correct credentials returns token
POST /api/notifications/push/send-test sends test push (with admin auth)
POST /api/notifications/push/broadcast returns 401 without auth or cron key
POST /api/stores/{id}/refresh endpoint exists and works (requires auth)
/terms route loads Terms of Service page
Frontend compiles and loads without errors
critical_code_review_comments: Push notifications are LOGGED but not actually sent to Expo servers (production would use exp.host API)
Store refresh tries real Shopify /products.json - returns 'simulated' if store doesn't expose it
Creator registration is PUBLIC endpoint (no auth needed) - by design for self-registration portal

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Privacy, Terms pages load correctly, frontend compiles)

seed_data_creation: Test creators created during testing with unique emails/handles per run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 adds: (1) Creator self-registration at /api/creators/* - register, login, browse, profile endpoints. Registration is PUBLIC. Login returns JWT token. (2) Push notifications at /api/notifications/push/* - register token, send test, broadcast. Requires subscription auth (admin JWT works). Broadcast also accepts CRON_API_KEY. (3) Store refresh at /api/stores/{id}/refresh tries real Shopify /products.json. (4) Privacy/Terms pages at /privacy and /terms (client-side React routes). Previous iterations 1-8 features still working.

mocked_apis.push_notifications: Push notifications are logged but not actually sent to Expo servers
mocked_apis.store_refresh: Tries real Shopify API, falls back to simulated if store doesn't expose /products.json
